con:part.con:content: <wsdl:definitions name="ConsultaPJeService" targetNamespace="http://ws.pje.cnj.jus.br/" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:tns="http://ws.pje.cnj.jus.br/" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:ns1="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"> <wsdl:types> <xs:schema attributeFormDefault="unqualified" elementFormDefault="unqualified" targetNamespace="http://ws.pje.cnj.jus.br/" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xs:element name="consultarAssuntosJudiciais" type="tns:consultarAssuntosJudiciais"/> <xs:element name="consultarAssuntosJudiciaisResponse" type="tns:consultarAssuntosJudiciaisResponse"/> <xs:element name="consultarClassesJudiciais" type="tns:consultarClassesJudiciais"/> <xs:element name="consultarClassesJudiciaisResponse" type="tns:consultarClassesJudiciaisResponse"/> <xs:element name="consultarCompetencias" type="tns:consultarCompetencias"/> <xs:element name="consultarCompetenciasResponse" type="tns:consultarCompetenciasResponse"/> <xs:element name="consultarJurisdicoes" type="tns:consultarJurisdicoes"/> <xs:element name="consultarJurisdicoesResponse" type="tns:consultarJurisdicoesResponse"/> <xs:element name="consultarOrgaosJulgadores" type="tns:consultarOrgaosJulgadores"/> <xs:element name="consultarOrgaosJulgadoresColegiados" type="tns:consultarOrgaosJulgadoresColegiados"/> <xs:element name="consultarOrgaosJulgadoresColegiadosResponse" type="tns:consultarOrgaosJulgadoresColegiadosResponse"/> <xs:element name="consultarOrgaosJulgadoresResponse" type="tns:consultarOrgaosJulgadoresResponse"/> <xs:element name="consultarPapeis" type="tns:consultarPapeis"/> <xs:element name="consultarPapeisResponse" type="tns:consultarPapeisResponse"/> <xs:element name="consultarPrioridadeProcessoResponse" type="tns:consultarPrioridadeProcessoResponse"/> <xs:element name="consultarProcessosPorProcessoReferencia" type="tns:consultarProcessosPorProcessoReferencia"/> <xs:element name="consultarProcessosPorProcessoReferenciaResponse" type="tns:consultarProcessosPorProcessoReferenciaResponse"/> <xs:element name="consultarSalasAudiencia" type="tns:consultarSalasAudienciaOrgaoJulgador"/> <xs:element name="consultarSalasAudienciaResponse" type="tns:consultarSalasAudienciaOrgaoJulgadorResponse"/> <xs:element name="consultarTiposAudiencia" type="tns:consultarTiposAudiencia"/> <xs:element name="consultarTiposAudienciaResponse" type="tns:consultarTiposAudienciaResponse"/> <xs:element name="consultarTiposDocumentoProcessual" type="tns:consultarTiposDocumentoProcessual"/> <xs:element name="consultarTiposDocumentoProcessualResponse" type="tns:consultarTiposDocumentoProcessualResponse"/> <xs:element name="consultarTodosTiposDocumentoProcessual" type="tns:consultarTodosTiposDocumentoProcessual"/> <xs:element name="consultarTodosTiposDocumentoProcessualResponse" type="tns:consultarTodosTiposDocumentoProcessualResponse"/> <xs:element name="recuperarInformacoesFluxo" type="tns:recuperarInformacoesFluxo"/> <xs:element name="recuperarInformacoesFluxoResponse" type="tns:recuperarInformacoesFluxoResponse"/> <xs:complexType name="consultarClassesJudiciais"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="arg0" type="tns:jurisdicao"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="jurisdicao"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="descricao" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="id" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarClassesJudiciaisResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:classeJudicial"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="classeJudicial"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="codigo" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="descricao" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="recursal" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="exigePoloPassivo" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="remessaInstancia" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="tipoPartePoloPassivo" type="tns:tipoParte"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="tipoPartePoloAtivo" type="tns:tipoParte"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoParte"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="idTipoParte" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="descTipoParte" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarJurisdicoes"> <xs:sequence/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarJurisdicoesResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:jurisdicao"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarTiposAudiencia"> <xs:sequence/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarTiposAudienciaResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:tipoAudiencia"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoAudiencia"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="descricao" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="id" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarProcessoReferencia"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="numeroProcesso" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarProcessoReferenciaResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="return" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="recuperarInformacoesFluxo"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="arg0" type="tns:classeJudicial"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="recuperarInformacoesFluxoResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:fluxo"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="fluxo"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="codClasseJudicial" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="id" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="xml" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarSalasAudienciaOrgaoJulgador"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="orgaoJulgador" type="tns:orgaoJulgador"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="orgaoJulgador"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="descricao" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="id" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="cargosJudiciais" nillable="true" type="tns:cargoJudicial"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="cargoJudicial"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="id" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="descricao" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarSalasAudienciaOrgaoJulgadorResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:salaAudiencia"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="salaAudiencia"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="id" type="xs:int"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="ignoraFeriado" type="xs:boolean"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="nome" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="orgaoJulgador" type="tns:orgaoJulgador"/> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="salaHorarioList" nillable="true" type="tns:salaHorario"/> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="tipoAudienciaList" nillable="true" type="tns:tipoAudiencia"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="tipoSala" type="tns:salaEnum"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="salaHorario"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="diaSemama" type="tns:diaSemanaEnum"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="horaFinal" type="xs:dateTime"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="horaInicial" type="xs:dateTime"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarPapeis"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="arg0" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarPapeisResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:papel"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="papel"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="identificador" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="nome" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarTodosTiposDocumentoProcessual"> <xs:sequence/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarTodosTiposDocumentoProcessualResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:tipoDocumentoProcessual"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="tipoDocumentoProcessual"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="codigo" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="descricao" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarPrioridadeProcesso"> <xs:sequence/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarPrioridadeProcessoResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:prioridadeProcesso"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="prioridadeProcesso"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="descricao" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="id" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarTiposDocumentoProcessual"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="arg0" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarTiposDocumentoProcessualResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:tipoDocumentoProcessual"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarOrgaosJulgadores"> <xs:sequence/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarOrgaosJulgadoresResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:orgaoJulgador"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarAssuntosJudiciais"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="arg0" type="tns:jurisdicao"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="arg1" type="tns:classeJudicial"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarAssuntosJudiciaisResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:assuntoJudicial"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="assuntoJudicial"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="codigo" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="descricao" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="complementar" type="xs:boolean"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarProcessosPorProcessoReferencia"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="numeroProcessoReferencia" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarProcessosPorProcessoReferenciaResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="return" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarOrgaosJulgadoresColegiados"> <xs:sequence/> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarOrgaosJulgadoresColegiadosResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:orgaoJulgadorColegiado"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="orgaoJulgadorColegiado"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="descricao" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="id" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarCompetencias"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="arg0" type="tns:jurisdicao"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="arg1" type="tns:classeJudicial"/> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="arg2" nillable="true" type="tns:assuntoJudicial"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="consultarCompetenciasResponse"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="return" type="tns:competencia"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:complexType name="competencia"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="descricao" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="id" type="xs:int"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> <xs:simpleType name="diaSemanaEnum"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="DOMINGO"/> <xs:enumeration value="SEGUNDA"/> <xs:enumeration value="TERCA"/> <xs:enumeration value="QUARTA"/> <xs:enumeration value="QUINTA"/> <xs:enumeration value="SEXTA"/> <xs:enumeration value="SABADO"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:simpleType name="salaEnum"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:enumeration value="A"/> <xs:enumeration value="S"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType> <xs:element name="consultarProcessoReferencia" nillable="true" type="tns:consultarProcessoReferencia"/> <xs:element name="consultarProcessoReferenciaResponse" nillable="true" type="tns:consultarProcessoReferenciaResponse"/> <xs:element name="consultarPrioridadeProcesso" nillable="true" type="tns:consultarPrioridadeProcesso"/> <xs:element name="consultarClassesJudiciaisRemessa" nillable="true" type="tns:consultarClassesJudiciais"/> </xs:schema> </wsdl:types> <wsdl:message name="consultarJurisdicoes"> <wsdl:part message="tns:consultarCompetencias" name="consultarCompetencias"></wsdl:input> <wsdl:output message="tns:consultarCompetenciasResponse" name="consultarCompetenciasResponse"></wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:portType> <wsdl:binding name="ConsultaPJeServiceSoapBinding" type="tns:ConsultaPJe"> <soap:binding style="document" transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/>
